diagrams.title: Regression Types Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy of regression methods from simple to advanced
diagrams.purpose: Understand different regression types and their applications

diagrams.title: Bias-Variance Tradeoff
diagrams.description: Graph showing how bias and variance change with model complexity, and the optimal point
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the tradeoff concept for model selection

diagrams.title: Good Fit vs Overfit vs Underfit
diagrams.description: Three scatter plots comparing underfitted, properly fitted, and overfitted regression models
elements: Underfit: straight line through curved data
Good Fit: smooth curve capturing trend
Overfit: wobbly line passing through every point
